groups.name: DOCA Software Package

groups.description: Some necessary additional setups need to be done before target components install.

NV_DOCA_UBUNTU_BLUEFIELD_CONTAINER_HOST_.name: Ubuntu ARM BlueField OS Container Image

execBash: safe_apt_install " sudo apt-get install -y qemu binfmt-support qemu-user-static " 5
echo sudo ifconfig tmfifo_net0 192.168.100.1 netmask 255.255.255.0 up
until nc -vzw 2 192.168.100.2 22 &> /dev/null; do sudo ifconfig tmfifo_net0 192.168.100.1 netmask 255.255.255.0 up & printf "%c" "."; done

remoteExecBash: safe_apt_install "sudo apt-get install -y apt-transport-https ca-certificates curl" 5

execBash: mst_device=`sudo mst status -v | grep /dev/mst | grep $device_lspci_0 | awk '{ print $2}'`
link_ports=(`sudo mlxconfig -d $mst_device -e q | grep -i link_type | awk '{ if (match($0, /LINK_TYPE\S*/, m)) printf m[0]" "}' `)
echo firmware update and reset finished
